programs.programName: Community First Choice Services (CFCS) / Personal Care Services (PCS)

verified.notes: Program officially renamed from CFC/PAS to CFCS/PCS as of 2026. Search results confirm eligibility requires Montana Medicaid eligibility and level of care determination, but do not contain specific age, income, or asset limits. These limits are likely set by Montana Medicaid state plan parameters, not program-specific thresholds. Phone number (888-706-1535) is Montana Public Assistance Helpline for application assistance. Official state source (dphhs.mt.gov) confirms program exists but does not provide specific financial limits in retrieved results.
